name: cloudflare
description: Cloudflare MCP servers for managing Workers, R2, D1, KV, and more.

cloudflare-docs.description: Get up to date reference information on Cloudflare documentation.

cloudflare-observability.description: Debug and get insight into your application's logs and analytics.

cloudflare-workers-bindings.description: Build Workers applications with storage, AI, and compute primitives (KV, R2, D1, etc.).

cloudflare-workers-builds.description: Get insights and manage your Cloudflare Workers Builds.

cloudflare-radar.description: Get global Internet traffic insights, trends, URL scans, and other utilities.

cloudflare-sandbox-containers.description: Spin up a sandbox development environment.

cloudflare-browser-rendering.description: Fetch web pages, convert them to markdown and take screenshots.

cloudflare-logpush.description: Get quick summaries for Logpush job health.

cloudflare-ai-gateway.description: Search your logs, get details about the prompts and responses.

cloudflare-autorag.description: List and search documents on your AutoRAGs.

cloudflare-auditlogs.description: Query audit logs and generate reports for review.

cloudflare-dns-analytics.description: Optimize DNS performance and debug issues based on current set up.

cloudflare-dex-analysis.description: Get quick insight on critical applications for your organization.

cloudflare-one-casb.description: Quickly identify any security misconfigurations for SaaS applications.

cloudflare-graphql.description: Get analytics data using Cloudflare’s GraphQL API.
